title: Windows Data Staging for Exfiltration
description: Detects data staging activity where an attacker collects and stages files before exfiltration. Indicators include copying files to temp directories, creating archives, or writing to removable media staging areas.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*robocopy.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/MIR*' or 'Command Line' like '*/E*' or 'Command Line' like '*/S*')) or ('Process Name' like '*xcopy.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/S*' or 'Command Line' like '*/E*')) or (('Command Line' like '*C:\Temp\staging*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\Users\Public\*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\ProgramData\staging*')) or (('Command Line' like '*compact /c*' or 'Command Line' like '*makecab*')))
